feed.title: bbcnews TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

entry.title: Three children have been wounded in a shooting at a school in the city of Vantaa in Finland, police have said. #Finland #Vantaa #School #ViertolaSchool #News #BBCNews
entry.content: Three children have been wounded in a shooting at a school in the city of Vantaa in Finland, police have said. #Finland #Vantaa #School #ViertolaSchool #News #BBCNews

entry.title: The horse was having a bit of a mare. #Horse #Rescue #AnimalRescue #HorseRiding #California #LosAngeles #News #BBCNews
entry.content: The horse was having a bit of a mare. #Horse #Rescue #AnimalRescue #HorseRiding #California #LosAngeles #News #BBCNews

entry.title: A child, aged 12, has been arrested after a deadly shooting at a primary school in Vantaa, Finland. #Finland #Vantaa #School #ViertolaSchool #News #BBCNews
entry.content: A child, aged 12, has been arrested after a deadly shooting at a primary school in Vantaa, Finland. #Finland #Vantaa #School #ViertolaSchool #News #BBCNews

entry.title: Do you think fans have a right to comment on stars’ relationships? #KPop #KPopStan #aespaKarina #Karina #aespa #LeeJaeWook #Music #SouthKorea #BBCNews
entry.content: Do you think fans have a right to comment on stars’ relationships? #KPop #KPopStan #aespaKarina #Karina #aespa #LeeJaeWook #Music #SouthKorea #BBCNews

entry.title: The German Football Association said a new number 4 design will be made. #Germany #Football #DFB #DeutscherFußballBund #FootballKit #GermanFootballAssociation #GermanyFootball #GermanFootball #FootballTikTok #Euro2024 #BBCNews
entry.content: The German Football Association said a new number 4 design will be made. #Germany #Football #DFB #DeutscherFußballBund #FootballKit #GermanFootballAssociation #GermanyFootball #GermanFootball #FootballTikTok #Euro2024 #BBCNews

entry.title: Seven people working for a food aid charity were killed in an Israeli strike in Gaza. #Israel #Gaza #IsraelGaza #News #BBCNews
entry.content: Seven people working for a food aid charity were killed in an Israeli strike in Gaza. #Israel #Gaza #IsraelGaza #News #BBCNews

entry.title: Three British civilians were among the seven aid workers killed in an Israeli strike on a Gaza aid convoy, the charity World Central Kitchen has confirmed. #Israel #Gaza #IsraelGaza #WorldCentralKitchen #News #BBCNews
entry.content: Three British civilians were among the seven aid workers killed in an Israeli strike on a Gaza aid convoy, the charity World Central Kitchen has confirmed. #Israel #Gaza #IsraelGaza #WorldCentralKitchen #News #BBCNews

entry.title: The ‘car cave’ in Gwynedd, Wales, went viral on social media - and now a group of cavers have been tidying up the mess left behind by influencers. #Gwynedd #Wales #Caving #CarCave #Cave #UKCaves #Abandoned #ExploreTheUK #Hiking #Adventure #BBCNe
entry.content: The ‘car cave’ in Gwynedd, Wales, went viral on social media - and now a group of cavers have been tidying up the mess left behind by influencers. #Gwynedd #Wales #Caving #CarCave #Cave #UKCaves #Abandoned #ExploreTheUK #Hiking #Adventure #BBCNe

entry.title: Why is it raining so much? #Rain #Weather #BritishWeather #Wet #Forecast #WeatherForecast #UKWeather #Pershore #Plymouth #Salisbury #Heathrow #News #BBCNews
entry.content: Why is it raining so much? #Rain #Weather #BritishWeather #Wet #Forecast #WeatherForecast #UKWeather #Pershore #Plymouth #Salisbury #Heathrow #News #BBCNews

entry.title: The Criminal Justice Bill could criminalise rough sleepers if they cause a "nuisance", including "excessive smells". #Homeless #Homelessness #RoughSleeping #GillianKeegan #SuellaBraverman #CriminalJusticeBill #UKPolitics #UKLaw #HouseOfCommons #News #BBCN
entry.content: The Criminal Justice Bill could criminalise rough sleepers if they cause a "nuisance", including "excessive smells". #Homeless #Homelessness #RoughSleeping #GillianKeegan #SuellaBraverman #CriminalJusticeBill #UKPolitics #UKLaw #HouseOfCommons #News #BBCN
